coachLine: Sim-optimal for skirmish uptime: first spike lands around minute 12 (Solaris), third item by minute 25. Take Demiurge: +13.9% on your burst combo at minute 15.

all.name: Marrow
all.note: Marrow (Major): missing-health-dependent omnivamp; no sustain-uptime model yet

all.name: Nihil
all.note: Nihil (Major): accrual rate depends on combat uptime (how long Doom persists per fight), which the closed-form sim cannot observe

all.name: Aion
all.note: Aion (Major): economy effect; valuable but outside combat objectives (revisit with gold curves)

all.name: Exarch
all.note: Exarch (Major): buffs the HEAL TARGET (usually an ally) — team-side value outside the single-hero sim; self-heal uptime depends on heal cadence vs the 4s window

augments.name: Storm of Salvation
augments.note: own-missing-health on-hit healing during Windburn; health-state conditional

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for lifesteal sustain, online around minute 24 — about 515 HP drained back over a 10s fight in the sim.
Strongest meta core for one-combo burst, online around minute 25 — about 711 damage in one combo in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer agrees: within 7% of our best core on one-combo burst. The winrate is earned, not luck.

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for lifesteal sustain, online around minute 24 — about 475 HP drained back over a 10s fight in the sim.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Augmentation: their 3s all-in loses 27% of its bite; you give up 27% of your damage.
